purpose: GitHub-tracked metadata for visual crops whose binary files are R2 derived assets.

skipped_regions.caption_literal: documento que reproduce nuestro grabado, dirigido por el virrey, marqués de Loreto, al gobernador español.
skipped_regions.source_context: The image is a reproduction of a handwritten letter. The accompanying printed article identifies it as a communication from the Viceroy, Marqués de Loreto, dated 10 October 1784, concerning the Malvinas Islands.
